name: listings-done-natural-language-recognized
description: Real-estate flow. After adding one listing, user types a natural-language done phrasing — 'I think that's all for now' — instead of the literal word 'done'. Bot must move to the photos phase. Earlier behavior: doneWords regex (^/done|finished|that's it|that's all|stop|enough|no more|bas|khatam$/) only matched short tokens, so 'I think that's all for now' fell through to parseListingText which returned no usable fields → re-ask. Now classifyListingsDetailsTurn LLM call recognizes any natural phrasing of 'done' in any language.

turns.user: I think that's all for now
